nasb.text: And when he comes to see me, he speaks falsehood; His heart gathers wickedness to itself; When he goes outside, he tells it.

esv.text: And when one comes to see me, he utters empty words, while his heart gathers iniquity; when he goes out, he tells it abroad.

cnv.text: 即使他來看我，說的也是假話； 他把奸詐積存在心裡， 走到外面才說出來。

ccb.text: 他们来看我时， 心怀恶意，满口谎言， 出去后散布流言。

csbs.text: 即使他来看我，也只说假话； 他心中积蓄奸恶， 走到外面才说出来。
